title: Convert item Update into new item

posts.author: sxf0 (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml: I need the ability to convert an update captured for an existing item, into a new item on the board. So many updates captured contain action items, and the fact that I cannot convert either the full update itself, or selected text within the update (with the same feature that Monday Docs provides), into a new item is extremely frustrating and leads to a ton of duplicative work.

posts.author: ThomasHancock (Thomas)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, this is a feature of ClickUp that is surprising still isn’t part of Monday.com

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
